block_00: You’re this 👌 close to getting access to your affiliate links and statistics.
block_01: Please enter your details to complete the registration process. It only takes a minute!
block_02: Sign in and accept the Terms and Conditions. Make sure to read them carefully — they contain important details.
block_03: Сhoose the desired Revenue Share payment offer: 40% or 50%.
block_04: Not sure which Revenue Share offer will suit you best? Estimate the number of traders you'll be able to attract. If you're positive you can do over 21 traders per month, the 50% offer will be more profitable. If you think there will be less than 21 new traders, settle with 40%. Check the detailed sample calculations on the offer choice page.
block_05: If you want to work with the CPA method*, select any Revenue Share offer — CPA will be automatically available in the Cabinet.
block_08: Once your registration is completed, you’ll get access to:
block_09: Personal link to add to your promo and start earning as an affiliate
block_10: Dashboard with your account and performance information
block_11: Advanced Revenue and CPA statistics, including mobile data, trading stats for all instruments, user and profit stats, etc.
block_12: Free promo materials: banners, landing pages, logos, videos, and more
